title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - Leadership_06_2026
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 0 course(s), 0 completed course(s), and 0 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is N/A, completion is N/A, pass rate is N/A, and average score is N/A/10. Total training hours are 0 and scaled cost is 0. Overall effectiveness classification is Risk. Management interpretation: The report indicates that there were no courses, trainees, or training activities recorded in the selected scope for Leadership_06_2026 in Q1 2026. Consequently, all effectiveness metrics are marked as N/A, and the overall effectiveness classification is categorized as Risk.
insights: The absence of any courses or trainee records suggests a significant gap in training delivery for the specified period.
This lack of training activity may impact overall employee development and organizational performance.
recommendations: Maintain the current delivery model and reuse top-performing materials for future cohorts.
It is crucial to investigate the reasons behind the lack of training offerings in this period.
Consider implementing strategies to ensure course availability and encourage participation in future training sessions to mitigate the identified risk.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.
